# Google Cloud Client Libraries for Rust - Client Libraries Showcase API

<!-- Code generated by sidekick. DO NOT EDIT. -->

Showcase represents both a model API and an integration testing surface for
client library generator consumption.

## Quickstart

The main types to work with this crate are the clients:

* [Compliance](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Compliance.html)
* [Echo](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Echo.html)
* [Identity](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Identity.html)
* [Messaging](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Messaging.html)
* [SequenceService](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.SequenceService.html)
* [Testing](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Testing.html)
* [Locations](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Locations.html)
* [IAMPolicy](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.IAMPolicy.html)
* [Operations](https://docs.rs/gapic-showcase/latest/gapic-showcase/client/struct.Operations.html)
